Empowering your potential 
Flexible career paths
Huawei offers flexible career paths in all domains to help you unleash your full potential. You can build a diverse range of skills by working in a variety of different professions, domains, and locations. Or you can delve deep into your field of choice. Whether you want to push your limits or seek more steady growth, you can forge your own path at Huawei.
Systematic training
We provide top-notch training with a wide variety of resources catered to different stages of your career. When you get started, we offer new employee training and assign mentors to help you adapt to your new role. As you work your way up, we have programs that help you hone your expertise and management skills.
Comprehensive educational resources
Access all the resources you need to upskill and reskill. In our internal knowledge communities, you can gain insights from colleagues and experts. In our Jiaxian Community, you can engage in depth with 6,000+ of our chief experts and 100,000+ engineers. You will also have access to 10,000+ courses on our iLearning platform.
See more
